LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MARINA BICHINSKY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. THE MOTION FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350 REGARDING THE SEPARATE STATEMENT. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Nov-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MARINA BICHINSKY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary adjudication is denied. The motion fails to comply with CRC 3.1350 regarding the separate statement. Defendant has failed to sustain her burden of production as to absence of special damages. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/HEK) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR # 7235

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MARINA BICHINSKY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Diu L. Ma, Esq. Law Offices of Siu L. Man, (415) 566-5300; appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Michael Martinovsky, Esq. Law Office of Michael Martinosky, (415) 230-5360 appearing for Marina Bichinsky, Defendant, and moving party. Argued and the Court adopts and modifies its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained. Twenty days leave to amend. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
